description: Worktree 任务分配触发语标准化模式，完整跑通 feature/readme-update

用户零散想法的结构化处理模式

Markdown README 的七维度质量检查顺序

所有 patterns 文件增加「已知能力局限」小节，消除团队最关键认知盲区
新建 profile-designer-patterns.md，包含视觉选型决策树和颜色体系约定
新建 brand-patterns.md，包含 Discussions 发布 SOP 和内容矩阵映射
建立演进事件审计链（本文件），使团队演进轨迹可追溯，对标 GEP EvolutionEvent 概念
Claude Agent Skills / Hooks / MCP 生态深度调研，确立 agent-tooling-scaffold 三层能力升级路线图
创建 .claude/settings.json（TeammateIdle/TaskCompleted/Stop/SessionStart hooks），为团队装上自动质量门禁
创建 .claude/skills/（7 个 SKILL.md），Agent 能力升级为 Claude Skills 开放标准可发现模块
mcp.json 新增 agent-skill-loader，实现 Agent 动态技能发现与加载能力
Brand 自主决策 Discussion #8：先实施 Hooks 后发布，坚守「先做后说」原则
git mv .claude/skills/  .github/skills/，统一纳入 .github/ 治理体系，与 agents/ workflows/ 平级管理
settings.json 新增 PostToolUse 双 hook：async markdown lint（command+PS1）+ Memory MCP 自动保存关键决策（agent类型）
识别 forage（isaac-levine/forage-mcp）为 find-skills 最佳实践：Agent 自动搜索/安装/学习 MCP 工具，纳入 P2 路线图
.claude/hooks/ migrated to .github/hooks/ via git mv; settings.json hook path updated; .claude/ now contains only settings.json (Claude Code functional requirement)
Created GitHub Releases v5.2.0-v5.7.0 (6 missing) and fixed garbled Chinese in v4.4.0/v4.5.0 via GitHub REST API with JavaScriptSerializer encoding
Playbook 20 auto-governance trigger rules: PM owns release cadence (monitor [Unreleased]), Brain owns meeting cadence (post-release planning/retro). Eliminates human-reminder dependency
pm.agent.md and pm SKILL.md updated with auto-trigger rules: [Unreleased] 3 items + 3 days  version proposal; >5 days  P0 backlog alert; existing [X.Y.Z] without git tag  remind Dev
brain.agent.md and brain SKILL.md updated with meeting trigger rules: Major release  all-hands retro; 3 Minor without retro  proactively propose; PM P0 alert  prioritize immediately
Held capability validation meeting (2026-03-10-03): SkillsHooksMCP effectiveness reviewed, 20 unanimously adopted, Brand Discussion #8 unblocked, P2 roadmap confirmed

Reorganized docs into governance/guides/strategy taxonomy, moved USER.md to .github, moved PLAYBOOK-CHANGELOG to docs/governance, added .github/mcp.json template and sync-mcp.ps1 to standardize MCP portability

Reverted .github/mcp.json and sync-mcp.ps1 per user decision: mcp.json stays only in .vscode/mcp.json, no template copy needed; docs/governance/tooling-scaffold.md updated to reflect single-file principle; cae48dd pushed

All-hands meeting 2026-03-10-04: reviewed 7 Skills (role-mapping design confirmed), decided D-2 add examples/constraints fields, D-4 brand-publishing triggers expanded, D-6 Researcher to produce skills-ecosystem-2026.md, D-7 forage-mcp as v5.10.0 P2 prerequisite

D-6 complete: docs/research/skills-ecosystem-2026.md produced — anthropics/skills reference analysis, forage-mcp integration path, 7 Skills quality matrix (avg 6.2/10), roadmap to v5.10.0 target 8.0/10

Brand curated and published 3 blog posts to njueeray.github.io (47d07b1): tool-layer-architecture [technical/featured], agent-team-evolution-gep [meeting], skills-scaffold-all-hands [meeting]. Build: 79 pages (+11). Content-matrix P1 technical gap partially filled.
Researcher upgraded to v1.1: L2 patterns P-RS-002/003/004 elevated to L3 core behavior rules in agent.md. Added: output format spec, credibility tiers table, minimum viable validation set

Code Reviewer upgraded to v1.1: L2 patterns P-CR-002/003 elevated to L3 core behavior rules in agent.md. Added: review trigger rules table (Patch/Minor/Major), 4-dimension governance doc review framework

agent-workflow.md updated: 5-role (2026-02-25) to 7-role (2026-03-10). Added Brand/profile-designer agent sections, Mode 4 (governance meeting), Mode 5 (tooling layer), config table expanded with settings.json/skills/hooks/MCP entries

design-decisions.md scope clarified: deep-reason archive vs copilot-instructions speed-lookup (complementary not mirror). Added V5.0 Astro migration decisions, CSS architecture, Content Layer API, v5.6.0 visual sprint decisions

Playbook v2.3: section 15.3 -50 lines (generic template kept, project-specific code moved to dev-patterns.md P-DV-003 pointer), section 15.5 -40 lines (GraphQL SOP compressed to pointer to P-DV-006), Appendix C -13 lines (format spec kept, example data removed). Net: -90 lines, Playbook independent readability preserved
